summary: Adds source_type column to channels and replaces sync_state.last_msg_id (INTEGER) with checkpoint (TEXT)

observations.text: sync_state is rebuilt via CREATE+INSERT+DROP+RENAME because SQLite does not support ALTER COLUMN. Existing integer last_msg_id values are CAST to TEXT during migration.
After this migration, checkpoint is TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '' — any channel that had no sync state gets an empty string checkpoint, which source adapters must treat as 'start from beginning'.
